notes: Companion to the live alb_president (yes-and). Authored + probe-validated by Claude (authoring role), no full run. IA CDX (domain match) harvests ~8,487 modern WordPress slug-permalink snapshots on president.al root + arkiva.president.al + /old/ (link_pattern = long root slug). president.al has cycled through 4 CMSes; the issue #16 'date permalinks' note was WRONG — there are no /YYYY/MM/ permalinks (old ASP /shqip/..asp?id= ~2001-2011, early WP ?p=id ~2014-16, modern root slugs ~2018-25). h1 titles clean; body via <article> + the engine's generic (trafilatura) fallback; DATE mostly absent from the DOM -> deferred to the cleaner (cf. lka/rou wayback). Harvest also pulls decrees + general-gov notices -> the cleaner's document-type gate + tenure crosscheck keep speeches/statements. FOLLOW-UPS: (1) the pre-2012 ASP era needs a separate *_asp_wayback variant; (2) set wayback_to at the live recipe's earliest date once known. FULL RUN (8k+ IA fetches) is the researcher's gate.
